allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Rework seat approval system and add invite-to-seat feature

Attendees now always require approval to sit. The "Lock Seating" toggle
controls whether hosts can self-seat and invite \(OFF\) or only the owner
can invite \(ON\). Owners/hosts can invite participants who accept via a
banner and are auto-seated in the first empty seat.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(Restricted" dialog with support contact info.

- Add DeviceRepository interface and Firestore implementation
- Provide @Named\("deviceId"\) via ANDROID_ID in AppModule
- Add device binding checks to AuthViewModel \(checkAuthState + signInWithGoogle\)
- Add AlertDialog to GoogleSignInScreen for device-locked state
- Always route through GoogleSignIn on app launch for binding verification

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(Policy" link on the user''s own profile screen.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
